Class TournamentController

java.lang.Object
java.util.Observable
com.risk.controller.TournamentController
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.fxml.Initializable
public class TournamentController extends Observable implements javafx.fxml.Initializable
This class provides all the methods to control various activities during the game play, implements Observer.
Author:
Palash Jain, Neha Pal, Karandeep Singh
